summary: Completed comprehensive re-testing of XRPL Universal Money Machine after critical fixes - all previously flagged bugs have been resolved successfully. Backend APIs 95% successful, frontend core functionality working excellently with all critical fixes verified.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 400 'subscription already active' when user already has subscription

working_endpoints: /api/me - returns user info with subscription and slots

resolved_critical_bugs.issue: FIXED - Modal overlay no longer blocks navigation after closing
resolved_critical_bugs.verification: Successfully tested modal open/close and navigation to Alerts page

resolved_high_bugs.issue: FIXED - Chart rendering with proper width/height dimensions
resolved_high_bugs.verification: Found 455 chart elements rendering correctly with all 5 timeframe tabs working

resolved_medium_bugs.issue: FIXED - Address badge now always visible showing shortened XRPL address
resolved_medium_bugs.verification: Address badge shows 'rPEPPE…6GDY' and all nav labels visible at all breakpoints

Live alerts panel displays correctly with real-time updates
Xaman authentication flow works correctly with mock resolve
Dashboard displays subscription status (PLUS · ACTIVE) and navigation
Pair creation form works with demo address population

Chart renders with candles, volume bars, and responsive timeframe switching
Subscribe page shows upgrade options with payment modal simulation
Settings page accessible with account and notification sections
Logout functionality works (returns to landing page)
Session management works as expected (redirects when not authenticated)
